description_long: This is a round, white ceramic plate featuring a colorful, raised floral and fruit design on its surface. The central motif includes two large, peach-like fruits surrounded by orange flowers and green leaves, all rendered in a slightly three-dimensional, hand-painted style. Along the upper rim, the phrase 'I am in PERLIS' is inscribed in bold, black lettering, adding a personalized or souvenir-like quality. The plate has a gently scalloped edge, giving it a delicate, decorative appearance. The surface is glossy, reflecting light and enhancing the vibrancy of the painted details. There are no visible chips, cracks, or signs of wear, suggesting the plate is in excellent condition.
description: A glossy white ceramic plate with raised orange floral and fruit decorations and the inscription 'I am in PERLIS' along the rim. The plate features a scalloped edge and vibrant, hand-painted details.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from a low angle, highlighting the inscription 'I am in PERLIS' and the raised orange flowers and fruits in the foreground.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the left side of the plate, showing more of the floral arrangement and the start of the inscription curving along the rim.
description_view_2: The plate is viewed from the opposite side, with the inscription appearing upside down and the fruits and flowers more centrally positioned.
description_view_3: The right side of the plate is visible, with the floral decorations and fruits prominent and the inscription partially visible along the rim.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Visible black inscription 'I am in PERLIS' along the rim, with colorful floral and fruit decorations in the center.
